chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1441 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Hearing of Main Case 28-10-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed; therefore, under instructions, he does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
